_meta.headline_for_feasibility_note: THE VINTAGE WINDOW IS CLOSING: gpt-3.5-turbo enters its shutdown wave 2026-07-23 (14 days from retrieval date); gpt-4/gpt-4o/o1 are already retired or retire by 2026-10. Any W4 design needing live API calls against historical vintages is infeasible for pre-2024 models and has weeks, not months, for the rest. Open-weight stand-ins (item 2) become the primary path, exactly as AMEND DAX-4 anticipated.
